mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, u.address as farmerAddress, IFNULL((SELECT SUM(quantity) FROM t_order_item i JOIN t_order o ON i.order_id = o.id WHERE i.product_id = p.id AND o.status >= 1), 0) AS sales, IFNULL((SELECT AVG(score) FROM t_review r WHERE r.product_id = p.id), 5.0) AS rating FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.farmer_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
